name: Naivedya Thali Restaurant
description: The most authentic Maharashtrian Thali in the city. Unlimited servings of traditional dishes.
menu_highlights: Puran Poli, Varan Bhaat, Shrikhand, Modak

name: Masala Dosa House
description: Famous for crispy masala dosas idli vada and filter coffee. Authentic South Indian flavors.
menu_highlights: Masala Dosa, Idli Sambar, Medu Vada, Filter Coffee

name: The Grill Room
description: Indulge in rich Mughlai preparations kebabs biryanis and North Indian curries in a royal ambiance.
menu_highlights: Chicken Tikka, Dal Makhani, Butter Naan, Biryani

name: Chaat Street Corner
description: Vibrant street food stall serving the best Pani Puri Bhel Dahi Puri and Sev Puri in town.
menu_highlights: Pani Puri, Bhel Puri, Dahi Puri, Sev Puri

name: Renaissance Dine
description: Fine dining with a wide variety of global and local cuisines. Premium experience with garden view seating.
menu_highlights: Continental Platter, Grilled Salmon, Pasta, Indian Curries

name: Biryani Blues
description: Authentic Hyderabadi biryani with aromatic spices. Also serves kebabs and curries.
menu_highlights: Hyderabadi Biryani, Seekh Kebab, Raita, Haleem

name: Pizza Paradise
description: Wood-fired pizzas with fresh toppings. Also serves pasta and Italian appetizers.
menu_highlights: Margherita Pizza, Pasta Arrabiata, Garlic Bread, Tiramisu

name: Chinese Wok
description: Authentic Chinese cuisine with Indo-Chinese favorites. Noodles fried rice and Manchurian specialties.
menu_highlights: Hakka Noodles, Fried Rice, Manchurian, Spring Rolls

name: Burger Junction
description: Gourmet burgers with variety of patties and toppings. Also serves fries and shakes.
menu_highlights: Classic Burger, Cheese Burst, Loaded Fries, Milkshakes

name: Saffron Indian Kitchen
description: Upscale restaurant with contemporary Indian cuisine. Live music on weekends.
menu_highlights: Butter Chicken, Paneer Tikka, Dal Tadka, Gulab Jamun

name: Cafe Coffee Day
description: Popular coffee chain with variety of hot and cold beverages. Light snacks available.

name: Tandoor Nights
description: Specializes in tandoori dishes. Kebabs tikkas and naan fresh from the clay oven.
menu_highlights: Tandoori Chicken, Seekh Kebab, Paneer Tikka, Garlic Naan
